description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark hip roof and a brick exterior, situated on a rectangular lot. The property features a wide driveway leading to a detached garage at the rear, and a large in-ground swimming pool with a surrounding patio area. The backyard also includes a small play structure, likely for children, and a swing set. The house has symmetrical window arrangements on the front facade, with a central entryway accessed by a short set of steps and a small porch. The garage is finished in a similar style to the house, with matching roof and brickwork. The landscaping is minimal, with small patches of grass and paved walkways connecting the main structures.
description: A two-story brick suburban house with a hip roof, detached garage, swimming pool, and backyard play area, set on a rectangular lot with a wide driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, driveway, and detached garage at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, hip roof, garage, pool, and backyard play area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, garage, and play structure, with the house's back elevation visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, pool, and side of the house with additional windows and driveway access.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and minimal decorative elements
